name: Ham with Noodles (Schinkennudeln)
recipeInstructions:
This is one of the most popular German casseroles, especially south of the Main Line.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
Cook the noodles in salted water and drain; they can also be left over from the day before. Fill a souffle pan with alternate layers of ham and noodles; season lightly and place some sour cream and grated cheese over each layer. The top layer should consist of noodles. Dot with small pieces of butter and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
Bake in the oven for about 30 minutes.
Variations:
This version of the recipe comes from Swabia; feel free to increase the proportions of the more expensive ingredients (ham, butter, sour cream) as desired.
In another version of this casserole, all ingredients are mixed together in one bowl with 3 eggs. The souffle pan is well greased with butter (always recommended), and the contents are transferred to the pan. Proceed as described above.
Makes 4 servings.
